blockers: Hermes mutations have no revision preconditions, native idempotency keys, typed confirmation, or durable mutation receipts.
Profile create can partially succeed because optional post-create operations are best-effort and some work may be asynchronous.
Safe delete rollback requires an upstream opaque snapshot/restore contract and a lifecycle dry-run.
recommendation: Ship sanitized reads and the persistent prepare/confirm/one-dispatch/reread governance substrate first; allowlist low-blast-radius settings next, and block profile deletion until Hermes provides revisioned dry-run and opaque restore contracts.
